---
title: "muninn_continuous.qmd"
---

# Feature: Muninn Continuous Ledger Refactor
In order to reduce friction and allow Muninn to repair Tech Debt silently without interrupting active engineering
As an AI Agent Operator
I want Muninn to respect repository silence, prioritize targets from a Ledger, and escalate stuck repairs.

## Scenario: Muninn waits for repository silence before auditing
  Given Muninn is deployed in continuous shadow mode
  When the repository's last edit was less than 5 minutes ago
  Then Muninn should block execution and wait
  And When the repository is silent for over 5 minutes
  Then Muninn should commence the hunt

## Scenario: Muninn selects targets from the Tech Debt Ledger
  Given a Tech Debt Ledger exists with prioritized targets
  When Muninn enters the target selection phase
  Then it should read the ledger and acquire the UNBLOCKED target with the highest priority
  And format it as a valid Muninn breach target

## Scenario: Muninn flags a file as blocked if the Crucible fails three times
  Given a target file that constantly fails the Crucible verification
  When Muninn attempts to repair it
  And the failure count reaches 3
  Then Muninn should flag the file as "BLOCKED_STUCK" within the Tech Debt Ledger
  And escalate the failure message to ODIN
